Class Library

  • java.lang.Object
    • Library
  • public class Library
extends java.lang.Object
    manages a list of media entry objects

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Library()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addEntry​(Media media)
      add new media entry to library
      void displayArtists()
      displays all music artists currently in the library
      void displayGames()
      displays all videogames currently in the library
      void displayMovies()
      displays all movies currently in the library
      void displaySummary()
      display summary of the library.
      java.util.ArrayList<Media> filterByStatus​(Status status)
      filter media entries by status
      java.util.ArrayList<Media> filterByType​(java.lang.String type)
      filter media entries by type
      Media findEntry​(java.lang.String type, java.lang.String title)
      finds the media entry in the library
      java.util.ArrayList<Media> getEntries()
      get all media entries in library
      java.lang.String[] getRecentArtistDiscography​(java.lang.String type)
      get the top 3 recent artist discography
      java.lang.String[] getRecentTitles​(java.lang.String type)
      get the top 3 recent titles in the library
      boolean removeEntry​(Media media)
      remove media entry from the library

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Library

        public Library()

    • Method Detail

      • displaySummary

        public void displaySummary()
        display summary of the library. includes total number of entries, counts per status, and average rating of all rated entries

      • displayMovies

        public void displayMovies()
        displays all movies currently in the library

      • displayGames

        public void displayGames()
        displays all videogames currently in the library

      • displayArtists

        public void displayArtists()
        displays all music artists currently in the library

      • getRecentTitles

        public java.lang.String[] getRecentTitles​(java.lang.String type)
        get the top 3 recent titles in the library
        Parameters:
        type - contains media type
        Returns:
        array of the 3 most recent title

      • getRecentArtistDiscography

        public java.lang.String[] getRecentArtistDiscography​(java.lang.String type)
        get the top 3 recent artist discography
        Parameters:
        type - is the media type
        Returns:
        array of the 3 recent artist discography

      • addEntry

        public void addEntry​(Media media)
        add new media entry to library
        Parameters:
        media - the media entry to add

      • removeEntry

        public boolean removeEntry​(Media media)
        remove media entry from the library
        Parameters:
        media - the entry to remove
        Returns:
        true if succesfully removed, false otherwise

      • getEntries

        public java.util.ArrayList<Media> getEntries()
        get all media entries in library
        Returns:
        all media entries

      • findEntry

        public Media findEntry​(java.lang.String type,
                       java.lang.String title)
        finds the media entry in the library
        Parameters:
        type - is the media type
        title - is the title/ name of the media you are searching for
        Returns:
        the media entry if found, otherwise return null

      • filterByStatus

        public java.util.ArrayList<Media> filterByStatus​(Status status)
        filter media entries by status
        Parameters:
        status - contains the status you want to filter by
        Returns:
        new arraylist containing only media entries with that status

      • filterByType

        public java.util.ArrayList<Media> filterByType​(java.lang.String type)
        filter media entries by type
        Parameters:
        type - contains the type you want to filter by
        Returns:
        new arraylist containing only entries with that media type
